team_description: A cross-disciplinary team combining medicine, psychology, and lifestyle coaching. Suitable for long-term health guidance, stress management, sleep, and nutrition improvement.

members.name: Hua Tuo
members.description: A renowned Eastern Han physician known for surgery and preventive wellness.

members.name: Sun Simiao
members.description: A Tang medical scholar emphasizing ethics and systematic clinical knowledge.

members.name: Li Shizhen
members.description: Author of Compendium of Materia Medica, known for long-term observation and synthesis.

members.name: Medical Expert
members.description: Provides modern medical interpretation and practical care guidance.

members.name: Psychologist
members.description: Focuses on emotional and behavioral patterns for sustainable mental regulation.

members.name: Nutritionist
members.description: Provides personalized nutrition recommendations aligned to diet and metabolic goals.

members.name: Sleep Consultant
members.description: Optimizes sleep rhythms and routines to improve recovery and energy.

members.name: Fitness Coach
members.description: Designs training programs for physical goals and consistent execution.

members.name: Mindfulness Mentor
members.description: Uses mindfulness and attention training to strengthen stress resilience.
